app.title: Systemd-manager-TUI: A TUI application for managing systemd services
app.author: thunderbong
app.description: A TUI application for managing systemd services.
proposed_tests: Install systemd-manager-tui and manage a systemd service
Test system service management features (start, stop, restart)
Compare systemd-manager-tui with other systemd UI tools
Benchmark performance on large systemd service sets
